calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2018 Off Calendar

Progress Report On The Deposit Of Money Into A Blocked Account For The Minor, Henry Iazzetta
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of Minor
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of the Minor, Henry Iazzetta.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Rebecca Tovar, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3775.

Daniel Dell'Osso, Esq. appeared with petitioner Jill Iazzetta, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Henry Iazzetta, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Ms. Iazzetta Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on May 18, 2017.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $97,281.43.*
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $70,000.00.
Other - $2,000.00 personal loan to Larry Stocker.

The net balance of $25,281.43 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at One Montgomery Street, San Francisco, CA 94104. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minors reach the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to September 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into a Blocked Account.

* On May 18, 2017, the Honorable Stephen M. Murphy issued an order approving the compromise of a pending action of the minor, Henry Iazzetta, as follows:

Settlement Amount - $1,500,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $365,398.06.
Costs - $43,869.17.

$5,951.37 of the net balance of $1,090,732.80 was deposited into a blocked accoutn with Wells Fargo Bank, located at One Montgomery Street, San Francisco, CA 94104.

$987,500.00 was invested into a single-premium deferred annuity with Prudential Assigned Settlement Services Corp.

The remaining $97,281.43 was deposited into the attorney/client trust account of the Brandi Law Firm, pending resolution of the Blue Sehield claim of lien, and is the suject of today's hearing to compromise the pending action of the minor.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2018 Continued To Oct-23-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Hearing On Blue Shield Claim Of Lien And Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgement Of Order For Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account And Annuity Funded.
Off Calendar Aug-10-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on Blue Shield Claim of Lien and Status.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.
Daniel Dell'Osso,_Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Henry Iazzetta by and through his Guardian Ad Litem Jill Iazzetta, not present in court.
Dennis Althouse, Esq., appeared on behalf of Lien Claimant Blue Shield.
The matter is argued, submitted, and taken under submission by the Court.

Hearing On Blue Shield Claim Of Lien And Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgement Of Order For Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account And Annuity Funded.
Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Continued To Aug-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Hearing On Blue Shield Claim Of Lien And Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgement Of Order For Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account And Annuity Funded.
Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Continued To Jul-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Of A Minor.
Off Calendar May-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, CSR: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098..
Daniel Dell'Osso Esq., appearing for Petitioner Jill Iazzetta mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Henry Iazzetta, present in court.
Dennis Althouse, Esq., appearing for lien claimant Blue Shield.
Petitioner and minor sworn and examined.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $1,500,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $365,398.06 payable to the Brandi Law Firm
Costs: $409,267.23
A net balance of $5,951.37 to be deposited into a blocked account at Wells Fargo Bank, One Montgomery Street, San Francisco, California, 94104, until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
$97,281.43 to be deposited into the attorney client trust account of the Brandi Law Firm pending resolution of the Blue Shield claim of lien. $987,500 to be invested in a single-premium deferred annuity.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor's Compromise and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account and Annuity funded.
Blue Shield claim of lien pending further determination of court.
Status Hearing Scheduled on July 11, 2017, at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account and annuity funded. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Department 514 prior to Hearing.
Hearing to argue Blue Shield lien scheduled on July 11, 2017, at 9:00AM in Department 514. Mr. Del'Osso's brief is due by June 1, 2017. Mr. Althouse's response is due by June 15, 2017. Mr. Del'Osso's reply is due by June 22, 2017.
